set T := Submodule.torsion A M
  set Q := M ⧸ T
  set sigma := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  set S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.1.primeCompl
  have hS : S ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := by
    intro s hs
    simp only [Submonoid.mem_iInf, S] at hs
    rw [mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero]
    intro h
    rcases sigma.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hn
    · simp only [Set.mem_empty_iff_false, iInf_neg, iInf_top, Submonoid.mem_top] at hs
    · let p := hn.some
      have hp : p ∈ sigma := hn.some_mem
      specialize hs p hp
      rw [Ideal.primeCompl, Set.mem_compl_iff, SetLike.mem_coe] at hs
      apply hs
      rw [h]
      exact p.1.zero_mem
  haveI : IsDomain (Localization S) := IsLocalization.isDomain_localization hS
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := by
    rcases sigma.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hn
    · simp only [Set.empty_subset, Set.finite_empty, iInf_neg, iInf_top] at S
      letI : IsLocalization (⊤ : Submonoid A) (Localization S) := inferInstance
      have : IsEmpty (PrimeSpectrum (Localization S)) := by
        rw [IsLocalization.primeSpectrum_empty_iff (⊤ : Submonoid A) (Localization S)]
        use 0, Submonoid.mem_top 0
      haveI : Subsingleton (Localization S) := Localization.subsingleton_iff.mpr ⟨0, Submonoid.mem_top 0, rfl⟩
      infer_instance
    · apply (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma ?_ hn ?_).2
      · exact Set.inter_subset_right _ _
      · exact Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support (M := T) (Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M)
  let f := (LocalizedModule.equivTorsionProdQuotient S M).linearlyEquivalent
  rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_bijective_map (hMT := Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M)
    (hNT := by
      letI := Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M
      letI := Submodule.isTorsion_torsion (T × Q)
      exact Submodule.isTorsion_torsion (T × Q))]
  · use f
    exact f.bijective
  · exact Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M
  · refine Module.IsTorsion.prod (Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M) ?_
    rw [Module.isTorsion_iff_localized_module_eq_zero]
    intro p
    simp only [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff, Submodule.Quotient.mk_smul, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
    intro x
    obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := (Module.isTorsion_iff_localized_module_eq_zero _).mp (Submodule.isTorsion_torsion M) (0 : T)
    use 1
    simp
